feature: Bank Reconciliation N:1 and 1:N Auto-Matching + Linea Negocio Auto-Fill in Factura Proveedor
summary: Complete testing of P1 Bank Reconciliation N:1/1:N matching and Enhancement for linea_negocio auto-fill. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Backend correctly returns suggestions with array format (banco_mov_ids[], sistema_mov_ids[]) and supports 1:1, 3:1, and 1:2 match types. Frontend displays group suggestions with sub-lines. Factura Proveedor auto-fills linea_negocio_id when selecting inventariable article.

Backend_sugerencias_endpoint.details: Returns 5 suggestions: 3x 1:1, 1x 3:1, 1x 1:2. Uses array format banco_mov_ids[] and sistema_mov_ids[].

Backend_array_format.details: All suggestions use new array format instead of singular banco_mov_id/sistema_mov_id.

Backend_no_duplicate_ids.details: No duplicate banco or sistema IDs across suggestions. Each movement appears in only one suggestion.

Backend_3_to_1_match.details: 3:1 match found: 1 banco deposit (3000) matching 3 sistema cobros (1000 each). banco_mov_ids=[37], sistema_mov_ids=[45,44,43]

Backend_1_to_2_match.details: 1:2 match found: 2 banco transfers (-1500, -1000) matching 1 sistema payment (-2500). banco_mov_ids=[39,40], sistema_mov_ids=[46]

Backend_confirmar_sugerencias.details: POST /api/conciliacion/confirmar-sugerencias accepts array-based suggestions and handles empty/malformed data gracefully.

Backend_articulos_oc_linea_negocio.details: GET /api/articulos-oc returns linea_negocio_id and linea_negocio_nombre for all articles.

Frontend_conciliacion_suggestions_banner.details: Banner shows '5 coincidencias encontradas (5 seleccionadas)' with Deseleccionar todas and Descartar buttons.

Frontend_conciliacion_group_suggestions.details: Suggestions list shows 5 rows with sub-lines for N:M matches. 3:1 shows 1 banco + 3 sistema lines. 1:2 shows 2 banco + 1 sistema lines.

Frontend_conciliacion_tipo_indicators.details: Match type indicators visible: '3:1' and '1:2' badges shown next to group suggestions.

Frontend_confirmar_sugerencias_button.details: Green 'Confirmar 5 Sugerencias' button visible and enabled in header.

Frontend_factura_linea_negocio_autofill.details: Selecting TEL001 article auto-fills LINEA NEG. field with 'Pantalon denim - Element Premium'.

test_credentials: empresa_id=7 (Ambission Industries), cuenta_financiera_id=13 (BCP Soles Test), no auth required
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data in cuenta_financiera_id=13: 1 bank deposit of 3000 matching 3 system cobros of 1000 each (N:1), 1 system payment of 2500 matching 2 bank transfers of -1500 and -1000 (1:N), plus 3 existing 1:1 matches.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank Reconciliation N:1/1:N matching fully functional. Backend: GET /api/conciliacion/sugerencias returns suggestions with array format (banco_mov_ids[], sistema_mov_ids[]) and tipo field (1:1, 3:1, 1:2). POST /api/conciliacion/confirmar-sugerencias processes array-based suggestions. Frontend: ConciliacionBancaria.jsx displays group suggestions with sub-lines, type indicators, and Confirmar Sugerencias button. Factura Proveedor: FacturaFormModal.jsx auto-fills linea_negocio_id when selecting inventariable article (line 120-123).
